overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a nighttime aerial vehicle journey through Night City. The camera alternates between views of rain-soaked neon skyscrapers and the luxurious vehicle interior featuring leather seating and an illuminated bar.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial vehicle viewing Arasaka corporate district

events.description: camera pans from exterior cityscape toward the vehicle interior

agents.ego_description: looking up at the Arasaka tower and surrounding neon-lit skyscrapers from inside a moving aerial vehicle

entered.detail: massive corporate skyscraper with glowing red Arasaka logo at the summit
tall building facade covered in stacked illuminated advertisements
high-rise building with blue 'ECO TOWER' signage visible on the side
large floating digital display showing a human face

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of Night City's skyline dominated by the Arasaka tower. The camera pans across various neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic advertisements as the aerial vehicle moves through the corporate district, before transitioning toward the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury aerial vehicle cabin with bar and seating

events.description: camera fully turns to interior, revealing gray leather luxury seats
camera focuses on bar area with intense red neon illumination

agents.ego_description: panning around the luxury vehicle interior, examining the leather seats and illuminated bar

entered.detail: gray leather seats with distinctive red accent stitching
circular bar with red neon underlighting and crystal glassware
warm yellow wall-mounted lights providing ambient illumination

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the luxurious interior of the aerial vehicle, showcasing premium leather seating and a sophisticated bar area bathed in red neon light. Warm wall sconces provide ambient lighting as the camera pans across the cabin's high-end finishes.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial transit through neon-lit downtown canyon

events.description: camera returns to window view as vehicle resumes travel through the city
vehicle descends to lower altitude, bringing view closer to street-level buildings

agents.ego_description: traveling through Night City in an aerial vehicle, observing passing skyscrapers and neon signage

entered.detail: large horizontal neon sign with 'MARMITE' text in bright colors
building facade with prominent red 'KABAYAN' neon signage
massive circular structure with red warning lights on top
bright pink neon hologram of a humanoid figure
lower residential building with blue-lit windows passing by at close range

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the window view as the vehicle continues its journey through Night City. It passes iconic neon signs including 'MARMITE' and 'KABAYAN', flies near a large circular rooftop platform, and descends to lower altitudes revealing street-level details and holographic advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the towering corporate skyline of Night City into the intimate luxury of a vehicle interior before returning to the neon-lit urban sprawl. It begins with a sweeping pan across the corporate district, where the Arasaka tower and holographic advertisements dominate the rain-soaked horizon. As the perspective shifts inward, the scene opens into a sophisticated cabin featuring premium leather seating and a bar area bathed in red neon and warm ambient light. The camera then glides back toward the window as the vehicle continues its journey, passing iconic signs like Marmite and Kabayan. Finally, the view descends from a large circular rooftop platform toward lower altitudes, revealing the intricate street-level details and glowing holograms of the city below.
